_note: The 'what's new since you left' bullets in the ~1-month win-back email (scripts/send-winback.mts reads this; core/mailer.ts renders it). Edit freely to keep the email evergreen — no code change or redeploy of the app is needed, the next send picks it up. Keep it to 2-4 punchy items; 'title' is bolded, 'body' follows an em-dash. If this file is missing or invalid, the sender falls back to DEFAULT_WINBACK_HIGHLIGHTS in core/mailer.ts.

highlights.title: Backtesting
highlights.body: test options strategies and ZeroGEX signals against historical market data, with a full tearsheet, Monte Carlo cone, benchmark, and a shareable report you can send to anyone.

highlights.title: TradeWorkz™ automated bots
highlights.body: a growing set of bots that post their entries and exits in real time, backed by a fully public trade audit that shows every win and loss, not just the highlights.

highlights.title: Sharper gamma levels & Live Bulletin
highlights.body: a rebuilt net-GEX methodology so the levels, cards, and daily reads all agree, plus a faster dashboard across the board.
